title: SoundHound AI Reports Record Second Quarter Q2 2025
text: SoundHound AI announced record Q2 2025 results with revenue reaching $42.7 million, representing 217% year-over-year growth. The company's most impressive quarterly achievement to date, driven by strong performance across automotive, restaurant, enterprise and IoT verticals. Non-GAAP gross margin reached 58%, though GAAP margin was impacted by acquisition-related costs. The company processed nearly 3 billion queries in Q2, doubling year-over-year volume. Expanded restaurant customer base to over 14,000 active locations, adding 1,000 new locations in the quarter. Management increased full-year 2025 revenue guidance to $160-178 million, reflecting strong momentum across multiple segments. Cash position remained strong at $230 million with zero debt, providing flexibility for continued investments in growth and technology development.
